subject: An armored guard with a long staff or polearm restrains a smaller bound figure with glowing magical bindings
description: A bearded, helmeted guard in heavy plate armor stands in a forward-facing pose, gripping a tall ornate staff or polearm. Glowing white-blue magical energy radiates around him, coiling like ribbons or chains that appear to bind a smaller crouched or restrained figure at his feet. The palette is dominated by cool steel blues, off-whites, and pale gold accents on the armor trim. The background dissolves into a soft, ambient haze of pale blue light, suggesting an official or sanctioned magical action rather than a violent confrontation. The composition reads as a portrait-leaning mid-shot of an authority figure mid-arrest.
foreground: armored guard with staff binding a smaller restrained figure in glowing magical chains
background: soft pale-blue ambient haze with no defined architecture
emotion: stern, authoritative, composed — the guard is calm and in control mid-arrest
